ogTitle: Diggers Camp vs Dilkoon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Diggers Camp and Dilkoon.
heading: Diggers Camp vs Dilkoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Diggers Camp, New South Wales and Dilkoon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Diggers Camp has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Dilkoon (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Diggers Camp or Dilkoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Diggers Camp has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Dilkoon scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Diggers Camp scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Dilkoon scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Diggers Camp or Dilkoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Diggers Camp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
